top_signals.title: Tencent tests AI assistant in China's most popular app as it looks to catch up with rivals
top_signals.summary: WeChat is an indispensable part of daily life in China and Tencent is trying to tap into its huge user base to expand use of its AI services.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Streeting backs Burnham to be next prime minister
top_signals.summary: Gilt yields dip as former health secretary seen as likely to take over as chancellor
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Keir Starmer steps down as UK prime minister
top_signals.summary: Departure comes as Wes Streeting backs Andy Burnham to be the next prime minister

top_signals.title: Klue OAuth breach victim list grows as Icarus hackers claim attack
top_signals.summary: Market intelligence platform Klue has publicly confirmed a recent security incident that allowed threat actors to steal OAuth tokens used to connect to customers' Salesforce environments, as the new "Icarus" extortion group publicly claims the attack. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Texas govt data breach exposes over 3 million driver’s licenses
top_signals.summary: The Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) disclosed a data breach at its license system vendor that exposed personal information for more than three million individuals. [...]
